neighborhoods.name: Upper West Side
neighborhoods.reason: Best for museums, Central Park, calmer evenings, and first-time solo travelers who want a residential base.

neighborhoods.name: Midtown
neighborhoods.reason: Best for short trips, late arrivals, and simple subway access to the classic first-time sights.

neighborhoods.name: Brooklyn Heights
neighborhoods.reason: Best for quiet streets, skyline walks, brownstone charm, and a softer landing after busy Manhattan days.

neighborhoods.name: Long Island City
neighborhoods.reason: Best value play when you want quick Manhattan access, skyline views, and hotels near reliable subway lines.
